description: The 'Ndrina Mandalari is a 'ndrina (family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Guardavalle, Calabria, Italy. It is involved in construction, real estate, international drug trafficking, money laundering, waste management, and public contracts. The group has strong ties to Freemasonry and operates in Italy as well as in New York, Nevada, and Arizona in the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: in America , negli Stati di New York , del Nevada e dell' Arizona
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Mandalari is present in the U.S. states of New York, Nevada, and Arizona.
